headline.name: headline
headline.default: 'Engineering Enablement for the Age of AI.'

subheadline.name: subheadline
subheadline.default: 'AHA Software is a consulting firm that builds products. Our SpecKit platform turns requirements into executable specifications — helping enterprise engineering teams eliminate rework and ship with confidence. Built enablement programs for AWS consulting partners at scale.'

section_subheading.name: section_subheading
section_subheading.default: 'A consulting firm that builds products. A product built from consulting expertise. Three ways we help enterprise engineering teams ship better software, faster.'

description.name: description
description.default: 'SpecKit™ is a platform, a framework, and a methodology — built by AHA Software to close the gap between what you specify and what gets shipped. License the tooling, bring in AHA to implement it, or train your teams to run it independently.'

proof_point.name: proof_point
proof_point.default: 'Proven across enterprise engagements — from Fortune 500 consulting to AWS-scale enablement.'

integration_description.name: integration_description
integration_description.default: 'SpecKit plugs into your existing CI/CD pipelines and development workflows. No platform migration required — just better traceability from spec to deployment.'

subheadline.name: subheadline
subheadline.default: 'Schedule a consultation to discuss engineering enablement, SpecKit implementation, or a delivery health check. No sales pitches — just technical experts who understand your stack.'
